text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One morning, while I'm out on a leisurely stroll...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
G-good morning, Cafe! Are you also going to
train?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Curious. So you wish to conquer the rising sun?!
Hats off to you! Who knew you had the makings
of a lead actress?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I... don't know what you're talking about... but I
think... I wouldn't compare myself... to you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! It goes without saying! Both you and
Doto are brilliant and undeniable catalysts to my
shine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, it follows that you two would be star
material yourselves! Bask in my resplendence and
shine brilliantly! Come, let us run together,
hand-in-hand, on this fine morning!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
U-um, Opera O? Cafe has already gone off on
her own.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, she has the tendencies of a feline. Turn
away for just a second and she's vanished,
gracefully and nimbly.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. Plus, she seems—how should I put this... She looks focused, like she's chasing something with all her heart.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
D-do you think that it could be the rumored,
invisible Friend of hers?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! A feline's friend would be a feline as
well! Even if one cannot see the other, their
footsteps pitter-patter in tandem!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, we shan't fall behind. Let us make haste,
Doto! Over yonder, to where the light shines!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: C-coming!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This early in the morning and they're already
bursting with energy. I silently offer my words of
encouragement and watch as they disappear into
the distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At night, as I finish up work and start to head
home, I come across Manhattan Cafe resting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that I saw her with T.M. Opera O and
Meisho Doto this morning.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: They are... good friends... with each other.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
They push each other... to be better... They're
different... from my Friend and me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm always... on the receiving end... I have...
nothing to give to my Friend... or anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I don't know a thing about this
"friend" she always talks about. But people with
clear goals become the target many strive
toward. That alone means she has something to
give.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: After... I passed you... my Friend was still ahead...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I see... I gotta admit, that's a little frustrating.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One could say the frustration that girl felt will
become a source of motivation. And it would all
be thanks to Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Phew... I should head back... to the track...
choice_data_list: You're really gonna run more laps?
You're really gonna run more laps?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. Just... a few more...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks tired. I should convince her to get some
rest.
choice_data_list:
What if you turn in early and continue tomorrow
morning?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...You're right.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Do you have... someone you want to... catch up
to?
choice_data_list: Well, I have quite a lot of rivals actually.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Must be nice... to have someone... as your
equal... Someone who inspires... and is inspired by
you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Showing a soft smile, Manhattan Cafe disappears
into the dark of the night.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I will keep running... day or night... as long as I
see my Friend... up ahead...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I will catch up... then proudly tell her... that I'm
her rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a slight bow of the head, Manhattan Cafe
returns to the track. I hear her whisper "sorry for
the wait" seemingly to no one.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No... I'm not...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, I can see that her legs look
slightly unsteady.
choice_data_list: You have to be in top shape.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like that one time, someone might ask to train
together with her. If she isn't fit to run when that
happens...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That isn't... a problem. I just want to... catch up
to... my Friend...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Manhattan Cafe heads back
towards the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes look longingly towards something
invisible to my eyes.
